revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Category" to "[[Category:pages with interlanguage linked categories]]{{ill|Category"
Removing from [[Category:Pages with interlanguage linked categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
